posts.text: R to @vxunderground: Wait, no. The C2 domain changed and the C2 blocked my IP. Give me your goopies.

posts.name: vxunderground
posts.text: Found a compromised website with ClickFix that successfully bypasses uBlock. The ClickFix payload uses LOLBINs and uses a WebDAV server. It was promising. The C2 is dead. YOU LIED TO ME
posts.text_zh: 使用 ClickFix 發現了一個受感染的網站，該網站成功繞過了 uBlock。 ClickFix 有效負載使用 LOLBIN 並使用 WebDAV 伺服器。這是有希望的。 C2已經死了。你對我撒謊了

posts.name: DarkWebInformer
posts.text: 🚨🇪🇸 Endesa customer and IBAN dataset allegedly listed for sale A forum actor claims to be selling a dataset allegedly obtained from Endesa, a Spanish energy company serving residential and business customers. The listing advertises information tied to more than 20 million individuals in a single SQL file. The actor describes the material as fresh 2026 data and lists a total size of approximately 1.06TB. The post specifically references IBAN information and includes links to a file-tree preview, a sample archive, and 10,000 sample records. This claim is currently unverified. 💥 Get early visibility into underground claims, including unblurred screenshots, before they turn into headlines: http://darkwebinformer.com/pricing
posts.text_zh: 🚨🇪🇸 據稱掛牌出售的 Endesa 客戶和 IBAN 資料集 一名論壇參與者聲稱正在出售據稱從 Endesa（一家為住宅和商業客戶提供服務的西班牙能源公司）獲得的資料集。該清單在一個 SQL 檔案中公佈了與超過 2000 萬人相關的資訊。該演員將該材料描述為 2026 年的新鮮數據，並列出了大約 1.06TB 的總大小。該帖子特別引用了 IBAN 信息，並包含文件樹預覽、示例存檔和 10,000 條示例記錄的連結。目前這一說法尚未得到證實。 💥 在地下索賠成為頭條新聞之前儘早了解它們，包括清晰的螢幕截圖：http://darkwebinformer.com/pricing

posts.name: MonThreat
posts.text: ⚠️ When two "medium-looking" vulnerabilities meet, the outcome isn't always medium. The recently disclosed wp2shell chain is a good example of why vulnerabilities should be evaluated as attack paths rather than isolated CVEs. A REST API authorization bypass (CVE-2026-63030) removes the authentication barrier. A separate SQL injection (CVE-2026-60137) suddenly becomes reachable. Neither issue tells the full story on its own, but together they can lead to administrative compromise and, ultimately, remote code execution. What makes this case stand out is that the vulnerabilities affect WordPress Core, not a third-party plugin or theme. In our latest blog, we explain: • How the exploit chain works • Which WordPress versions are affected • Why the combined risk is much higher than the individual CVSS scores suggest • What defenders should verify after applying the patches If you're responsible for WordPress environments, this is worth reviewing. ➡️ http://threatmon.io/inside-wp2shell-how-two-wordpress-core-bugs-became-a-critical-rce-chain #WordPress #CyberSecurity #ThreatIntelligence #ApplicationSecurity #RCE #CVE
posts.text_zh: ⚠️ 當兩個「中等」的漏洞相遇時，結果並不總是中等。最近揭露的 wp2shell 鍊是一個很好的例子，說明了為什麼漏洞應該被評估為攻擊路徑而不是孤立的 CVE。 REST API 授權繞過 (CVE-2026-63030) 消除了身分驗證障礙。突然可以存取單獨的 SQL 注入 (CVE-2026-60137)。這兩個問題本身都無法說明全部問題，但它們結合起來可能會導致管理妥協，並最終導致遠端程式碼執行。這個案例之所以引人注目，是因為這些漏洞影響的是 WordPress 核心，而不是第三方外掛或主題。在我們最新的部落格中，我們解釋了： • 漏洞利用鍊如何運作 • 哪些 WordPress 版本受到影響 • 為什麼綜合風險遠高於單一 CVSS 分數建議的風險 • 應用修補程式後防禦者應驗證哪些內容 如果您負責 WordPress 環境，則值得查看。 ➡️ http://threatmon.io/inside-wp2shell-how-two-wordpress-core-bugs-became-a-ritic-rce-chain #WordPress #Cyber​​Security #ThreatIntelligence #ApplicationSecurity #RCE #CVE

posts.name: vxunderground
posts.text: Have you ever accidentally lost 50,000 malwares? I downloaded 50,000 malwares and I don't know where it went. No, I'm serious, I actually have no idea where the malware went. I'm confused and scared. Have you seen my malware?
posts.text_zh: 您是否曾經不小心遺失過 50,000 個惡意軟體？我下載了 50,000 個惡意軟體，但我不知道它去了哪裡。不，我是認真的，我實際上不知道惡意軟體去了哪裡。我很困惑，也很害怕。你看到我的惡意軟體了嗎？

posts.name: vxunderground
posts.text: R to @vxunderground: Oh, I forgot. One other thing. I had a few people say I should focus more on news. People said using keywords like "breaking" can improve engagement and potentially bring more people to this social media account. I appreciate the insight, feedback, and thoughtfulness. However, I am very much ... I don't know the word ... I guess I don't really give a fuck bro. Yes, people and monies and stuff is cool, but I don't want to be a slop account. I'm just going to continue doing what I'm doing. Malware source code, samples, and papers for free, forever. Cheers
posts.text_zh: R 致@vxunderground：哦，我忘了。另一件事。有幾個人說我應該多關注新聞。人們表示，使用「破壞」等關鍵字可以提高參與度，並有可能吸引更多人造訪該社群媒體帳號。我很欣賞你的洞察力、回饋和深思熟慮。然而，我非常......我不知道這個詞......我想我真的不在乎兄弟。是的，人和金錢之類的東西很酷，但我不想成為一個垃圾帳戶。我將繼續做我正在做的事情。惡意軟體原始碼、範例和論文永久免費。乾杯

posts.name: vxunderground
posts.text: Administrative update: 1. I am going to begin the process of thanking people for malware submissions and/or papers and/or recommendations. They will be placed somewhere on the website. You can exaggerate yourself on LinkedIn and say you're a collaborator. 2. I have a large volume of malware papers and malwares in queue. It is 175,000 malwares, 20 or so papers. As is tradition, malware analysis will be coupled with the papers too. That is expanded every month as new material comes in. 3. I have no plans to resurrect the virus exchange for the time being, unless someone (preferably a large company) is willing to bank roll the entire thing. I can provide the malware goopies, but computers are expensive. 4. Per request from OG vx-underground nerds, in more serious posts discussing technical topics, I will drop the silly cats and instead revive the classic edgy vx-underground dark. I will introduce a balance between seriousness, and edgy Hot Topic Goth, and generate kitty cat stuff. Thank you everyone for the love and support. I see your messages and e-mails. I am enjoying the summer with my son and family, so I am simply less inside at the moment. I will (hopefully) do more malwares soon.
posts.text_zh: 行政更新： 1. 我將開始感謝人們提交惡意軟體和/或論文和/或建議。它們將被放置在網站上的某個位置。您可以在 LinkedIn 上誇大自己並說您是合作者。 2. 我有大量惡意軟體論文和惡意軟體正在排隊。共有 175,000 個惡意軟體、20 篇左右的論文。按照傳統，惡意軟體分析也將與論文一起提供。隨著新資料的出現，這個範圍每個月都會擴大。 3. 我暫時沒有計畫恢復病毒交換，除非有人（最好是大公司）願意為整件事情提供資金支持。我可以提供惡意軟體，但電腦很昂貴。 4. 根據 OG vx-underground 書呆子的要求，在討論技術主題的更嚴肅的帖子中，我將放棄愚蠢的貓，而是恢復經典的前衛 vx-underground 黑暗。我將介紹嚴肅性和前衛熱門話題哥德之間的平衡，並生成小貓的東西。感謝大家的愛護與支持。我看到你的訊息和電子郵件。我正在與我的兒子和家人一起享受夏天，​​所以我現在只是不那麼在裡面了。我（希望）很快就會製作更多惡意軟體。

posts.name: MonThreat
posts.text: Pinned: 🚨 Critical WordPress Pre-Auth Exploit Chain: WP2Shell A newly disclosed exploit chain, WP2Shell, allows attackers to fully compromise vulnerable WordPress sites without authentication. ThreatMon IntelHub has released a free detection tool to help identify exposed instances. 🔎 Check your site: ThreatMon IntelHub - Free Security Tools The vulnerability chain 🔸 CVE-2026-63030 – Route confusion in the REST /batch/v1 endpoint 🔸 CVE-2026-60137 – SQL Injection via WP_Query::author__not_in Potential impact An unauthenticated attacker can: ✅ Verify the SQL injection remotely ✅ Create a new administrator account ✅ Upload a malicious plugin ✅ Execute arbitrary commands on the server ✅ Achieve full site compromise Affected versions: WordPress 6.8.0 – 7.0.1 About the detection tool ✔️ Detection-only (non-intrusive) ✔️ No account required ✔️ Free to use Recommended actions 🔹 Update WordPress to the latest patched release immediately. 🔹 Review recently created administrator accounts. 🔹 Audit installed and active plugins for anything unfamiliar. 🔹 Restrict access to /wp-json/batch/v1 and ?rest_route=/batch/v1 at the edge until systems are patched. ⏱️ It takes less than 10 seconds to check whether your site is exposed. #WordPress #CyberSecurity #ThreatIntelligence #CVE #WP2Shell #SQLInjection #PreAuth #RCE
posts.text_zh: 已固定：🚨 關鍵的 WordPress 預授權漏洞利用鏈：WP2Shell 新揭露的漏洞利用鏈 WP2Shell 允許攻擊者在無需身份驗證的情況下完全破壞易受攻擊的 WordPress 網站。 ThreatMon IntelHub 發布了免費檢測工具來幫助識別暴露的實例。 🔎 檢查您的網站：ThreatMon IntelHub - 免費安全工具 漏洞鏈 🔸 CVE-2026-63030 – REST /batch/v1 端點中的路由混亂 🔸 CVE-2026-60137 – 透過 WP_Query::author _in 虛擬性注入 ✅ 建立新的管理員帳戶✅ 上傳惡意外掛程式 ✅ 在伺服器上執行任意指令 ✅ 實作全站入侵 受影響版本：WordPress 6.8.0 – 7.0.1 關於偵測工具 ✔️ 僅有（非侵入式） ✔ 🔹 查看最近建立的管理員帳戶。 🔹 審核已安裝和活動的插件是否有任何不熟悉的情況。 🔹 限制對邊緣的 /wp-json/batch/v1 和 ?rest_route=/batch/v1 的訪問，直到系統得到修補。 ⏱️不到10秒即可檢查您的網站是否有曝光。 #WordPress #Cyber​​Security #ThreatIntelligence #CVE #WP2Shell #SQLInjection #PreAuth #RCE

posts.name: DailyDarkWeb
posts.text: 🚨 Alleged Just Eat Database Advertised on Cybercrime Forum A threat actor is advertising what they claim is a database containing approximately 90 million Just Eat user records on a cybercrime forum. According to the listing, the alleged dataset includes: * User IDs * Email addresses * Password hashes * Full names * Country information * Currency codes * Account types * Membership dates * Email verification status * Campaign activity * Additional account metadata The post includes a sample of the purported database but does not provide sufficient evidence to independently verify the authenticity, origin, or recency of the data. Daily Dark Web has not confirmed that the data originated from a compromise of Just Eat or Just Eat http://Takeaway.com. Analyst Note: Large consumer database claims are common on cybercrime forums. Many are recycled, aggregated from previous breaches, or artificially inflated. Organizations and users should wait for technical validation before assuming a new compromise has occurred. #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #JustEat
posts.text_zh: 🚨 涉嫌在網路犯罪論壇上宣傳 Just Eat 資料庫 一名威脅行為者正在網路犯罪論壇上宣傳他們聲稱包含約 9000 萬條 Just Eat 用戶記錄的資料庫。根據清單，涉嫌的資料集包括： * 使用者 ID * 電子郵件地址 * 密碼雜湊 * 全名 * 國家資訊 * 貨幣代碼 * 帳戶類型 * 會員日期 * 電子郵件驗證狀態 * 活動活動 * 其他帳戶元資料 此貼文包含據稱資料庫的樣本，但沒有提供足夠的證據來獨立驗證資料的真實性、來源或新近性。 Daily Dark Web 尚未證實這些資料源自 Just Eat 或 Just Eat http://Takeaway.com 的外洩。分析師註釋：大型消費者資料庫索賠在網路犯罪論壇上很常見。許多是回收的、從以前的違規行為中匯總的，或者是人為誇大的。組織和使用者應等待技術驗證，然後再假設發生新的攻擊。 #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #JustEat

posts.name: DailyDarkWeb
posts.text: 🇫🇷 Alleged http://Stickers-Moto.fr Database Posted on Cybercrime Forum A threat actor has published what they describe as a small SQL database belonging to http://Stickers-Moto.fr, a French online retailer specializing in motorcycle stickers and accessories. According to the forum post, the leaked files allegedly include: * User records (Users.csv) * Order history (Commandes.csv) * Session-related data * Customer account information The post suggests the dataset is relatively small and includes sample records from multiple CSV files. At the time of writing, Daily Dark Web has not independently verified the authenticity of the leaked data or confirmed that it originated from a compromise of http://Stickers-Moto.fr. Analyst Note: Even small e-commerce database leaks can expose valuable customer information that enables phishing, credential stuffing, and account takeover attacks, particularly if users have reused passwords across multiple services. #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #France
posts.text_zh: 🇫🇷 據稱 http://Stickers-Moto.fr 資料庫發佈在網路犯罪論壇上 一名威脅行為者發布了他們所描述的屬於 http://Stickers-Moto.fr 的小型 SQL 資料庫，這是一家專門從事摩托車貼紙和配件的法國線上零售商。根據論壇帖子，洩漏的文件據稱包括： * 使用者記錄 (Users.csv) * 訂單歷史記錄 (Commandes.csv) * 會話相關資料 * 客戶帳戶資訊 此帖子表明資料集相對較小，包含來自多個 CSV 檔案的範例記錄。截至撰寫本文時，Daily Dark Web 尚未獨立驗證洩漏資料的真實性，也未確認其源自 http://Stickers-Moto.fr 的洩漏。分析師註釋：即使是小型電子商務資料庫洩漏也可能會暴露有價值的客戶訊息，從而導致網路釣魚、撞庫和帳戶接管攻擊，特別是當用戶在多個服務中重複使用密碼時。 #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #France

posts.name: DailyDarkWeb
posts.text: 🇲🇽 Alleged CECyTE Tabasco Database Leaked A threat actor has posted what they claim is the full database of CECyTE Tabasco (Colegio de Estudios Científicos y Tecnológicos del Estado de Tabasco), a public educational institution in Mexico. According to the post, the dataset allegedly includes: * RFC (Mexican Tax ID) * CURP (National ID) * Gmail/email addresses * Usernames * Password hashes * Full names and related account information The listing references the institution's website (http://cecytab.edu.mx) and advertises the database as a complete dump. At the time of writing, Daily Dark Web has not independently verified the authenticity of the data or confirmed whether it originated from a compromise of CECyTE Tabasco. Analyst Note: Educational institutions continue to be attractive targets due to the large volume of student, faculty, and administrative records they maintain. Even when passwords are stored as hashes, exposed identity data such as CURP and RFC can significantly increase the risk of identity theft and phishing. #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #Mexico
posts.text_zh: 🇲🇽 據稱 CECyTE Tabasco 資料庫洩露 威脅行為者發布了他們聲稱的墨西哥公立教育機構 CECyTE Tabasco (Colegio de Estudios Científicos y Tecnológicos del Estado de Tabasco) 的完整資料庫。根據該帖子，該資料集據稱包括： * RFC（墨西哥稅號） * CURP（國民身分證） * Gmail/電子郵件地址 * 使用者名稱 * 密碼雜湊 * 全名和相關帳戶資訊 此清單引用了該機構的網站 (http://cecytab.edu.mx) 並將資料庫宣傳為完整的轉儲。截至本文撰寫時，Daily Dark Web 尚未獨立驗證資料的真實性或確認其是否源自 CECyTE Tabasco 的妥協。分析師註釋：教育機構仍然是有吸引力的目標，因為它們保存大量的學生、教師和行政記錄。即使密碼儲存為雜湊值，暴露的身份資料（例如 CURP 和 RFC）也會顯著增加身分盜竊和網路釣魚的風險。 #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #Mexico

posts.name: DailyDarkWeb
posts.text: 🇮🇩 Alleged Indonesian Government Cyber Division Access Offered for Sale A threat actor is advertising what they claim is access to an Indonesian government cyber division/police environment on a cybercrime forum. According to the listing: * Claimed target: Indonesian Government Cyber Division / Police * Access type: Unspecified network or system access * Asking price: $300 * Escrow services accepted * Buyers instructed to contact the seller privately The listing provides virtually no technical details, proof of access, screenshots, or evidence supporting the claim. As a result, the authenticity, scope, and impact of the alleged access cannot be independently verified. Analyst Note: Government access advertisements frequently appear on cybercrime forums, but many are fraudulent, outdated, or significantly exaggerated. Organizations should treat such listings as potential early warning indicators while awaiting technical validation or official confirmation. #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #Indonesia
posts.text_zh: 🇮🇩 據稱出售印尼政府網路部門的存取權限 威脅行為者正在網路犯罪論壇上宣傳他們聲稱可以存取印尼政府網路部門/警察環境的內容。根據清單： * 聲稱的目標：印尼政府網路部門/警察 * 存取類型：未指定的網路或系統存取 * 要價：300 美元 * 接受託管服務 * 買家被指示私下聯絡賣家 該清單幾乎沒有提供技術細節、存取證明、螢幕截圖或支持該聲明的證據。因此，所指控的訪問的真實性、範圍和影響無法獨立驗證。分析師註釋：政府訪問廣告經常出現在網路犯罪論壇上，但許多廣告都是欺詐性的、過時的或嚴重誇大的。組織應將此類清單視為潛在的預警指標，同時等待技術驗證或官方確認。 #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #Indonesia

posts.name: DailyDarkWeb
posts.text: AI can write code. AI can generate reports. AI can solve complex problems. But that Excel workbook created in 2013? That's protected by ancient magic. #DDW #AI #Excel #TechHumor
posts.text_zh: AI可以寫程式碼。人工智慧可以產生報告。人工智慧可以解決複雜的問題。但是 2013 年創建的 Excel 工作簿呢？它受到古老魔法的保護。 #DDW #AI #Excel #TechHumor

posts.name: DailyDarkWeb
posts.text: 🇻🇳 Alleged Database from Vietnamese Website Advertised on Cybercrime Forum A threat actor is advertising what they claim is a fresh database from **http://wasaki.vn**, a Vietnam-based website. According to the sample shared in the listing, the dataset allegedly includes: * User IDs * Usernames * Password hashes * Email addresses * Display names * Registration timestamps * Account activation keys * User roles * WordPress account metadata The exposed schema appears consistent with a WordPress user table, suggesting the listing may contain user account information and administrative accounts. However, the authenticity, origin, and recency of the dataset have not been independently verified. At the time of writing, there is no public confirmation from the organization regarding a security incident matching these claims. Analyst Note: WordPress-based websites remain frequent targets for attackers exploiting vulnerable plugins, themes, weak credentials, or outdated installations. Even when passwords are hashed, exposed account databases can facilitate credential stuffing, phishing, and further attacks if password reuse is involved. #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #Vietnam
posts.text_zh: 🇻🇳 據稱來自越南網站的資料庫在網路犯罪論壇上發布廣告 威脅行為者正在宣傳他們聲稱來自越南網站 **http://wasaki.vn** 的新資料庫。根據清單中共享的樣本，該資料集據稱包括： * 使用者 ID * 使用者名稱 * 密碼雜湊值 * 電子郵件地址 * 顯示名稱 * 註冊時間戳 * 帳戶啟動金鑰 * 使用者角色 * WordPress 帳戶元資料 暴露的架構與 WordPress 使用者表一致，表示該清單可能包含使用者帳戶資訊和管理帳戶。然而，資料集的真實性、來源和新近性尚未得到獨立驗證。截至撰寫本文時，該組織尚未公開確認與這些說法相符的安全事件。分析師註釋：基於 WordPress 的網站仍然是攻擊者利用易受攻擊的外掛程式、主題、弱憑證或過時安裝的常見目標。即使密碼經過雜湊處理，如果涉及密碼重複使用，暴露的帳戶資料庫也可能促進憑證填充、網路釣魚和進一步的攻擊。 #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #Vietnam

posts.name: DailyDarkWeb
posts.text: 🇺🇸 Alleged Database from Arizona Caregiver Training Platform Advertised on Cybercrime Forum A threat actor is advertising what they claim is a fresh database from **http://online.arizonacaregivertraining.net**, an online caregiver training platform. According to the sample shared in the listing, the dataset allegedly contains: * User IDs * Usernames * Password hashes * Email addresses * First and last names * Identification numbers * Phone numbers * Institutional and department information * Physical addresses * City and country * Language and timezone settings * Account status and policy information The post includes a sample of the alleged records and download links. However, the authenticity, origin, and recency of the dataset have not been independently verified. At the time of writing, there is no public confirmation from the organization regarding a security incident matching these claims. Analyst Note: Online education and certification platforms often store large amounts of personally identifiable information (PII). If confirmed, a compromise of this nature could expose users to credential stuffing, phishing, and identity theft, particularly if passwords were reused across multiple services. #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #USA
posts.text_zh: 🇺🇸 據稱來自亞利桑那州護理人員培訓平台的資料庫在網路犯罪論壇上刊登廣告 威脅行為者正在宣傳他們聲稱來自線上護理人員培訓平台 **http://online.arizonacaregivertraining.net** 的新資料庫。根據清單中共享的樣本，該資料集據稱包含： * 使用者 ID * 使用者名稱 * 密碼雜湊值 * 電子郵件地址 * 名字和姓氏 * 身分證號碼 * 電話號碼 * 機構和部門資訊 * 實體地址 * 城市和國家 * 語言和時區設定 * 帳戶狀態和政策資訊 該貼文包括涉嫌記錄和下載連結的樣本。然而，資料集的真實性、來源和新近性尚未得到獨立驗證。截至撰寫本文時，該組織尚未公開確認與這些說法相符的安全事件。分析師附註：線上教育和認證平台通常會儲存大量個人識別資訊（PII）。如果得到證實，這種性質的妥協可能會讓使用者面臨撞庫、網路釣魚和身分盜竊的風險，特別是在多個服務中重複使用密碼的情況下。 #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #USA

posts.name: DailyDarkWeb
posts.text: 🇲🇽 400,327 Mexican Government Supplier Records Allegedly Exposed A threat actor is claiming that an exposed database belonging to **DIF Tamaulipas** (Sistema para el Desarrollo Integral de la Familia), a family services agency under the Government of Tamaulipas, Mexico, contains information on more than **400,000 supplier registrations**. According to the post, the exposed records allegedly include: * Supplier names (individuals and companies) * Mexican Tax IDs (RFC) * Full physical addresses * Municipalities and states * Legal representative names * Business categories * Contact phone numbers * Email addresses * Internal registration numbers The actor claims the database was accessible without authentication and provides a description of the exposed fields. However, the authenticity of the data, the exposure method, and whether the database remains publicly accessible have not been independently verified. At the time of writing, there has been no public confirmation from DIF Tamaulipas regarding the alleged exposure. Analyst Note: Government supplier databases often contain sensitive business and personally identifiable information. If confirmed, exposures of this nature can increase the risk of procurement fraud, business email compromise (BEC), identity theft, and targeted phishing campaigns against registered vendors. #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #Mexico
posts.text_zh: 🇲🇽 400,327 條墨西哥政府供應商記錄據稱遭到洩露 威脅行為者聲稱，屬於墨西哥塔毛利帕斯州政府下屬家庭服務機構 **DIF Tamaulipas** (Sistema para el Desarrollo Integral de la Familia) 的資料庫包含超過 **400,000 個供應商註冊**的資訊。根據該帖子，據稱暴露的記錄包括： * 供應商名稱（個人和公司） * 墨西哥稅號 (RFC) * 完整的實際地址 * 市和州 * 法定代表人姓名 * 業務類別 * 聯繫電話號碼 * 電子郵件地址 * 內部註冊號碼 攻擊者聲稱無需驗證即可訪問資料庫，並提供了暴露欄位的描述。然而，資料的真實性、曝光方式以及資料庫是否仍可公開存取尚未獨立驗證。截至撰寫本文時，DIF Tamaulipas 尚未公開證實所謂的曝光事件。分析師註釋：政府供應商資料庫通常包含敏感的商業和個人識別資訊。如果得到證實，這種性質的暴露可能會增加採購詐欺、商業電子郵件洩露 (BEC)、身份盜竊和針對註冊供應商的有針對性的網路釣魚活動的風險。 #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #Mexico

posts.name: DailyDarkWeb
posts.text: 🇮🇩 Alleged Indonesian National Vaccine Database Advertised on Cybercrime Forum A threat actor is advertising what they claim is a second database from Indonesia's national vaccine system. According to the listing, the dataset allegedly contains: * National Identification Numbers (NIK) * Full names * Places and dates of birth * Residential addresses * Gender * Telephone numbers * District and subdistrict information * Administrative records * Creation and update timestamps The forum post describes the data as a "second database" and includes a sample of the alleged records. However, the authenticity, origin, and scope of the dataset have not been independently verified. At the time of writing, there is no public confirmation from Indonesian authorities regarding a breach matching these claims. Analyst Note: Government health databases remain attractive targets due to the volume of personally identifiable information they contain. However, threat actors frequently repackage or relist previously leaked datasets, making independent validation essential before drawing conclusions. #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #Indonesia
posts.text_zh: 🇮🇩 據稱印尼國家疫苗資料庫在網路犯罪論壇上刊登廣告 一名威脅行為者正在宣傳他們聲稱是印尼國家疫苗系統的第二個資料庫。根據清單，該資料集據稱包含： * 國民身分證號碼 (NIK) * 全名 * 出生地點和日期 * 居住地址 * 性別 * 電話號碼 * 區和分區資訊 * 行政記錄 * 建立和更新時間戳 該論壇帖子將這些資料描述為“第二個資料庫”，並包含了所謂記錄的樣本。然而，資料集的真實性、來源和範圍尚未得到獨立驗證。截至本文撰寫時，印尼當局尚未公開確認與這些說法相符的違規行為。分析師註釋：政府健康資料庫仍然是有吸引力的目標，因為它們包含大量的個人識別資訊。然而，威脅行為者經常重新打包或重新列出先前洩漏的資料集，因此在得出結論之前必須進行獨立驗證。 #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #Indonesia

posts.name: DailyDarkWeb
posts.text: 🇬🇹 Alleged Guatemalan Citizen Database Advertised with Election-Related Claims A threat actor is advertising what they claim is a database containing personal information on Guatemalan citizens, while also alleging, without providing evidence, that the data was used to manipulate Guatemala's 2023 elections. According to the listing, the dataset allegedly contains: * National identification numbers * Full names * Dates of birth * Tax identification numbers * Email addresses * Profile photographs (for some individuals) The post includes a sample of the alleged data and download links. However, the authenticity of the dataset and the accompanying claims regarding election manipulation have not been independently verified. At the time of writing, there is no publicly available evidence confirming that this dataset was involved in Guatemala's 2023 election process or that it originated from an election-related system. Analyst Note: Threat actors frequently attach sensational political narratives to leaked datasets to increase visibility and perceived value. The existence of a dataset does not substantiate broader claims of election fraud or interference, which require independent forensic and investigative evidence. #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #Guatemala
posts.text_zh: 🇬🇹 涉嫌危地馬拉公民資料庫發布與選舉相關的聲明 威脅行為者正在宣傳他們聲稱包含危地馬拉公民個人資訊的資料庫，同時在沒有提供證據的情況下聲稱這些資料被用來操縱危地馬拉 2023 年選舉。根據清單，該資料集據稱包含： * 國民身分證號碼 * 全名 * 出生日期 * 稅務識別號碼 * 電子郵件地址 * 個人資料照片（針對某些個人） 該貼文包含所指控資料的樣本和下載連結。然而，數據集的真實性以及隨附的有關選舉操縱的說法尚未得到獨立驗證。截至本文撰寫時，沒有公開證據證實該資料集參與了危地馬拉 2023 年的選舉過程或源自與選舉相關的系統。分析師註釋：威脅行為者經常將聳人聽聞的政治敘事附加到洩漏的資料集中，以提高可見性和感知價值。資料集的存在並不能證實更廣泛的選舉詐欺或乾擾指控，這需要獨立的法證和調查證據。 #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #Guatemala

posts.name: DailyDarkWeb
posts.text: 🇧🇷 Alleged 20,000-Record Database from Brazilian E-Commerce Site Advertised on Cybercrime Forum A threat actor is advertising what they claim is a fresh database from **http://lojanegociosdigital.com.br**, a Brazilian e-commerce platform, containing approximately **20,000 customer records**. According to the listing and sample, the dataset allegedly includes: * Customer IDs * Billing email addresses * Order and transaction IDs * Payment method details * Order status and timestamps * Billing and IP addresses * Currency and tax information * WooCommerce order metadata The forum post labels the dataset as a recent leak and requires forum credits to access the download. However, the authenticity, origin, and freshness of the data have not been independently verified. At the time of writing, there is no public confirmation from the organization regarding a security incident matching these claims. Analyst Note: Smaller e-commerce platforms running WooCommerce remain frequent targets for attackers exploiting vulnerable plugins, weak administrative credentials, or outdated software. Until independently validated, the claimed compromise should be treated as unverified. #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #Brazil
posts.text_zh: 🇧🇷 涉嫌在網路犯罪論壇上宣傳巴西電子商務網站的 20,000 條記錄資料庫 威脅行為者正在宣傳他們聲稱來自巴西電子商務平台 **http://lojanegociosdigital.com.br** 的新資料庫，其中包含大約 **20,000 條客戶記錄**。根據清單和樣本，該資料集據稱包括： * 客戶 ID * 帳單電子郵件地址 * 訂單和交易 ID * 付款方式詳細資訊 * 訂單狀態和時間戳 * 帳單和 IP 位址 * 貨幣和稅務資訊 * WooCommerce 訂單元資料 論壇貼文將資料集標記為最近洩露，並需要論壇積分才能存取下載。然而，數據的真實性、來源和新鮮度尚未得到獨立驗證。截至撰寫本文時，該組織尚未公開確認與這些說法相符的安全事件。分析師註釋：經營 WooCommerce 的小型電子商務平台仍然是攻擊者利用易受攻擊的插件、薄弱的管理憑證或過時的軟體的常見目標。在經過獨立驗證之前，所聲稱的妥協應被視為未經驗證。 #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #巴西

posts.name: vxunderground
posts.text: Chat, big shenanigans are afoot. Zyaire Dontaevious Zamarion Wilkins, one of the individuals behind the "BlockBlasters" steam malware campaign, also social engineered people online by pretending to be a woman. Wilkins, and a currently unlisted number of people, worked to spearphish people who owned cryptocurrency. They published a fake game on Steam named "BlockBlasters" which received international attention for crypto draining a terminally ill cancer patient. It turns out Wilkins also impersonated a person named @sibeleth That girl who was flirting with you, asking about how much money you hold in crypto, was actually a 21 year old African American man
posts.text_zh: 聊天，大惡作劇正在進行中。 Zyaire Dontaevious Zamarion Wilkins 是「BlockBlasters」蒸氣惡意軟體活動的幕後黑手之一，他也透過假裝女性對網路進行社交工程。威爾金斯和目前未列出的一些人致力於對擁有加密貨幣的人進行魚叉式網路釣魚。他們在 Steam 上發布了一款名為「BlockBlasters」的假遊戲，該遊戲因用加密貨幣耗盡末期癌症患者的生命而受到國際關注。事實證明，威爾金斯還冒充了一個名叫@sibeleth 的人，那個與你調情、詢問你持有多少錢的加密貨幣的女孩實際上是一名 21 歲的非裔美國男子

posts.name: DailyDarkWeb
posts.text: Ecopetrol confirms cyberattack affecting approximately 3,300 accounts Colombia’s state-owned energy company Ecopetrol confirmed a cyber incident impacting roughly 3,300 user accounts. The company acknowledged unauthorized access but stated that operational systems were not affected. Underground actors are already attempting to capitalize on the incident with breach-related discussions. #DDW #ecopetrol #colombia #cyberattack
posts.text_zh: Ecopetrol 證實網路攻擊影響了約 3,300 個帳戶 哥倫比亞國有能源公司 Ecopetrol 確認了一次網路事件，影響了約 3,300 個使用者帳戶。該公司承認未經授權的訪問，但表示作業系統沒有受到影響。地下組織已經嘗試利用該事件進行與違規相關的討論。 #DDW #ecopetrol #colombia #cyberattack

posts.name: DailyDarkWeb
posts.text: 🍕🍔 Alleged 95 Million Uber Eats User Database Offered for Sale A threat actor has advertised what they claim is a database containing records for more than 95 million Uber Eats users. The forum listing provides only a brief description and limited sample data, without disclosing technical details about the alleged source of the information or when the data was obtained. At this stage, the post does not provide sufficient evidence to verify: * The authenticity of the dataset * Whether the data originated from Uber Eats * Whether the records are current or compiled from previous leaks Neither Uber Eats nor Uber has publicly acknowledged any incident matching these claims. Analyst Note: High-profile brands are frequently used in cybercrime marketplace listings to attract buyers. Claims involving tens of millions of records should be treated with caution until independent verification confirms the data's authenticity and origin. #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #Uber
posts.text_zh: 🍕🍔 據稱出售 9500 萬 Uber Eats 優食用戶資料庫 威脅行為者宣傳了他們聲稱包含超過 9500 萬 Uber Eats 優食用戶記錄的資料庫。論壇列表僅提供簡短描述和有限的樣本數據，沒有透露有關所謂資訊來源或數據獲取時間的技術細節。現階段，該貼文沒有提供足夠的證據來驗證： * 資料集的真實性 * 資料是否源自 Uber Eats * 這些記錄是最新的還是根據先前的洩漏彙編而成 Uber Eats 和 Uber 都沒有公開承認任何與這些說法相符的事件。分析師註：網路犯罪市場清單中經常使用知名品牌來吸引買家。在獨立驗證確認資料的真實性和來源之前，應謹慎對待涉及數千萬筆記錄的索賠。 #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #Uber

posts.name: DailyDarkWeb
posts.text: 🇲🇽 Mexican Traffic Authority Database Allegedly Exposed A threat actor has advertised what they claim is the complete driver's license database and management platform for the Traffic Police of Baja California Sur, Mexico. According to the listing, the dataset allegedly contains records for approximately 325,000 individuals and includes access to the associated license management system. The post claims the database contains fields such as: * Driver's license type and number * Full name * RFC and CURP identifiers * License issuance details * License status * Pension status * Social Security number * Residential address * Additional personal information At the time of writing, these claims remain unverified, and no official statement has been issued by the Baja California Sur authorities regarding the alleged incident. Analyst Note: Government licensing databases contain highly sensitive personal information that can facilitate identity theft, fraud, and targeted social engineering. Claims involving both database access and administrative systems should be treated as high priority until independently verified. #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #Mexico
posts.text_zh: 🇲🇽 墨西哥交通管理局資料庫涉嫌暴露 威脅行為者宣傳了他們聲稱是墨西哥南下加利福尼亞州交通警察的完整駕駛執照資料庫和管理平台。根據清單，該資料集據稱包含約 325,000 人的記錄，並包括對相關許可證管理系統的存取。該貼文聲稱資料庫包含以下欄位： * 駕照類型和號碼 * 全名 * RFC 和 CURP 識別碼 * 駕照發放詳細資料 * 駕照狀態 * 退休金狀況 * 社會安全號碼 * 居住地址 * 其他個人資訊 截至撰寫本文時，這些說法尚未得到證實，南下加州當局尚未就所指控的事件發布任何官方聲明。分析師註釋：政府許可資料庫包含高度敏感的個人訊息，可能會促進身分盜竊、詐欺和有針對性的社會工程。在獨立驗證之前，涉及資料庫存取和管理系統的索賠應被視為高優先級。 #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #Mexico

posts.name: DailyDarkWeb
posts.text: 🇮🇶 Alleged 11 Million-Record Asiacell Database Advertised on Cybercrime Forum A threat actor using the alias "313team" has advertised what they claim is an 11 million-record database associated with Iraqi telecommunications provider Asiacell. The forum post provides very few details beyond the title, offering no sample data, technical description, or evidence to support the claim. At this stage, the listing does not disclose: * The types of records allegedly included * The date of the alleged compromise * The source of the data * Any proof-of-compromise or database samples As a result, the authenticity of the claim cannot currently be verified. Neither Asiacell nor Iraqi authorities have publicly acknowledged the alleged incident. Analyst Note: Large database claims posted without supporting evidence should be treated cautiously. Threat actors frequently exaggerate record counts or recycle previously leaked datasets to attract buyers. Additional verification will be necessary before assessing the legitimacy and potential impact of this claim. #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #Iraq
posts.text_zh: 🇮🇶 涉嫌在網路犯罪論壇上宣傳有 1100 萬筆記錄的 Asiacell 資料庫 一名化名「313team」的威脅行為者在廣告中宣傳了他們聲稱與伊拉克電信提供商 Asiacell 相關的有 1100 萬筆記錄的資料庫。除了標題之外，論壇貼文提供的細節很少，沒有提供樣本數據、技術描述或支持該主張的證據。在此階段，該清單未披露： * 據稱包含的記錄類型 * 涉嫌洩露的日期 * 資料來源 * 任何洩露證明或資料庫樣本 因此，目前無法驗證該聲明的真實性。 Asiacell 和伊拉克當局均未公開承認此事件。分析師註：應謹慎對待沒有證據支持的大型資料庫聲明。威脅行為者經常誇大記錄數量或回收先前洩露的資料集以吸引買家。在評估該聲明的合法性和潛在影響之前，需要進行額外的驗證。 #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #Iraq

posts.name: DailyDarkWeb
posts.text: 🇧🇩 Bangladeshi Educational Institution Allegedly Suffers Database Leak A threat actor has published what they claim is the complete database of Glory School & College (http://glorycollege.edu.bd), a private educational institution located in Dhaka, Bangladesh. According to the forum post, the leaked data allegedly includes: * Administrative Gmail account(s) * Usernames * Hashed passwords * School database records The actor claims the entire database has been made available for download, although no technical details regarding the alleged intrusion have been disclosed. At the time of writing, these claims remain unverified, and Glory School & College has not publicly acknowledged the alleged incident. Analyst Note: Educational institutions often maintain sensitive information on students, parents, faculty, and administrative staff. Even if passwords are hashed, a confirmed compromise could enable credential attacks, phishing campaigns, or unauthorized access if weak password practices were used. #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #Bangladesh
posts.text_zh: 🇧🇩 孟加拉國教育機構據稱遭受資料庫洩漏威脅行為者發布了他們聲稱的位於孟加拉國達卡的私立教育機構 Glory School & College (http://glorycollege.edu.bd) 的完整資料庫。根據論壇帖子，洩漏的資料據稱包括： * 管理 Gmail 帳戶 * 用戶名 * 雜湊密碼 * 學校資料庫記錄 該行為者聲稱整個資料庫已可供下載，但尚未披露有關涉嫌入侵的技術細節。截至本文撰寫時，這些說法尚未得到證實，榮耀學校學院尚未公開承認所指控的事件。分析師註：教育機構通常保存有關學生、家長、教師和行政人員的敏感資訊。即使密碼經過雜湊處理，如果使用弱密碼做法，已確認的洩漏也可能導致憑證攻擊、網路釣魚活動或未經授權的存取。 #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #Bangladesh

posts.name: DailyDarkWeb
posts.text: 🇧🇷 Alleged Leak Exposes Data from 16 Brazilian Educational Institutions A threat actor has published what they claim are databases from 16 educational institutions across Brazil, allegedly containing more than 170,000 enrollment records. According to the listing, the affected organizations include universities, schools, language institutes, and educational foundations, including: * Escola Superior de Artes Célia Helena * APCD * Univar * UniHorizontes * Aliança Francesa (multiple branches) * Fundação Marianense de Educação * INML * Cursau * APRS * And several other educational institutions The actor claims the dataset contains one enrollment record per row and has made the databases available for download. At the time of writing, the authenticity of the leaked data has not been independently verified, and none of the listed institutions have publicly confirmed the alleged incident. Analyst Note: Educational institutions continue to face growing cyber threats due to the large volumes of student and staff data they maintain. Even relatively small datasets can expose personally identifiable information (PII) that may be leveraged for phishing, identity theft, or other social engineering attacks if the claims are confirmed. #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #Brazil
posts.text_zh: 🇧🇷 涉嫌洩露 16 家巴西教育機構的數據 一名威脅行為者公佈了他們聲稱的巴西 16 家教育機構的數據庫，據稱包含超過 170,000 條入學記錄。根據清單，受影響的組織包括大學、學校、語言學院和教育基金會，包括： * Escola Superior de Artes Célia Helena * APCD * Univar * UniHorizo​​​​ntes * Aliança Francesa（多個分支機構） * Fundação Marianense de Educação * INML Cursau * 該資料集所包含的其他資料集截至撰寫本文時，洩漏資料的真實性尚未得到獨立核實，也沒有一家上市機構公開證實了所指控的事件。分析師註釋：由於教育機構維護大量學生和教職員工數據，因此它們繼續面臨日益增長的網路威脅。即使相對較小的資料集也可能會暴露個人識別資訊 (PII)，如果聲明得到證實，這些資訊可能會被用於網路釣魚、身分盜竊或其他社會工程攻擊。 #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #巴西

posts.name: DailyDarkWeb
posts.text: 🇨🇳 Chinese Marathon Platform Allegedly Breached, 69K Admin Records Exposed A threat actor has claimed responsibility for breaching http://qufumarathon.com, alleging unauthorized access to the platform's administrative backend. According to the forum post, the leaked data includes: * 69,082 user records * Administrative usernames * Hashed passwords * Backend account information * User profile data The actor claims to have obtained full backend access and published a sample of the alleged database. While the passwords are reportedly hashed, they could still pose a risk if weak hashing algorithms or easily guessable passwords were used. At the time of writing, these claims remain unverified, and there has been no public confirmation from the organization regarding the alleged breach. Analyst Note: Administrative account compromises present significantly greater risk than standard user account breaches. If verified, attackers could leverage privileged access to manipulate systems, access additional sensitive data, or establish persistent access to the environment. #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #China
posts.text_zh: 🇨🇳 中國馬拉鬆平台據稱遭到破壞，6.9 萬筆管理記錄被洩露 威脅行為者聲稱對破壞 http://qufumarathon.com 負有責任，指控未經授權訪問該平台的管理後端。根據論壇帖子，洩漏的資料包括： * 69,082 使用者記錄 * 管理使用者名稱 * 雜湊密碼 * 後端帳戶資訊 * 用戶個人資料資料 攻擊者聲稱已獲得完整的後端存取權限並發布了涉嫌資料庫的樣本。雖然據報道密碼經過雜湊處理，但如果使用弱雜湊演算法或容易猜測的密碼，它們仍然可能帶來風險。截至撰寫本文時，這些說法尚未得到證實，該組織尚未就涉嫌違規行為進行公開確認。分析師註：管理帳戶外洩所帶來的風險比標準使用者帳號外洩的風險大得多。如果經過驗證，攻擊者可以利用特權存取來操縱系統、存取其他敏感資料或建立對環境的持久存取。 #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #China

posts.name: DailyDarkWeb
posts.text: 🇲🇽 Mexican Government Citizen Service Platform Allegedly Leaked A threat actor has published what they claim is a database belonging to SIAC Tabasco (Sistema Integral de Atención Ciudadana), a citizen service platform used in Villahermosa, Tabasco, Mexico. According to the forum post, the leaked data appears to contain personally identifiable information (PII). The sample shown includes fields such as: * Full names * Email addresses * Phone numbers * Home addresses * Municipality and state * Postal codes * Gender * Date and place of birth * Occupation and profession At the time of writing, the size of the dataset has not been disclosed, and the authenticity of the leaked data has not been independently verified. Neither SIAC Tabasco nor the relevant government authorities have publicly confirmed the alleged incident. Analyst Note: Citizen service portals frequently store extensive personal information to support public services. If verified, a compromise of this nature could expose residents to identity theft, phishing, and other forms of social engineering. #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #Mexico
posts.text_zh: 🇲🇽 墨西哥政府公民服務平台據稱遭洩露 威脅行為者發布了他們聲稱屬於 SIAC Tabasco (Sistema Integral de Atención Ciudadana) 的數據庫，該數據庫是墨西哥塔巴斯科州 Villahermosa 使用的公民服務平台。根據論壇帖子，洩漏的資料似乎包含個人識別資訊（PII）。顯示的樣本包括以下欄位： * 全名 * 電子郵件地址 * 電話號碼 * 家庭住址 * 市和州 * 郵遞區號 * 性別 * 出生日期和地點 * 職業和職業 截至撰寫本文時，資料集的大小尚未披露，洩漏資料的真實性尚未經過獨立驗證。 SIAC Tabasco 和相關政府當局均未公開證實此事件。分析師註：公民服務入口網站經常儲存大量個人資訊以支援公共服務。如果得到證實，這種性質的妥協可能會讓居民面臨身分盜竊、網路釣魚和其他形式的社會工程。 #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #Mexico

posts.text: 🚨 RocketCloud bulletproof VPS service advertised on a cybercrime forum A forum actor is advertising RocketCloud, a hosting provider promoting bulletproof VPS infrastructure alongside standard hosting plans. The listing offers four bulletproof VPS tiers, with configurations reaching 8 vCPUs, 16GB of RAM, 120GB of SSD storage, unlimited bandwidth, and a 1 Gbit port. Standard VPS plans advertise 10 Gbit ports. The service claims to provide 99.9% uptime, full root access, high-performance infrastructure, 24/7 support, and cryptocurrency payments. The operator also claims to manage 65 active servers and serve 164 customers. This claim is currently unverified. Get early visibility into underground claims, including unblurred screenshots, before they turn into headlines: http://darkwebinformer.com/pricing
posts.text_zh: 🚨 RocketCloud 防彈 VPS 服務在網路犯罪論壇上做廣告 一名論壇演員正在為 RocketCloud 做廣告，這是一家託管提供商，在標準託管計劃的同時推廣防彈 VPS 基礎設施。此清單提供四個防彈 VPS 層，配置達到 8 個 vCPU、16GB RAM、120GB SSD 儲存、無限頻寬和 1 Gbit 連接埠。標準 VPS 計劃宣傳 10 Gbit 連接埠。該服務聲稱提供 99.9% 的正常運作時間、完全根訪問、高效能基礎設施、24/7 支援和加密貨幣支付。該營運商還聲稱管理 65 台活動伺服器並為 164 名客戶提供服務。目前這一說法尚未得到證實。在地下索賠成為頭條新聞之前儘早了解這些索賠，包括清晰的螢幕截圖：http://darkwebinformer.com/pricing

posts.name: DailyDarkWeb
posts.text: 🇧🇷 Brazilian Hospital Allegedly Suffers Data Breach A threat actor has listed Hospital Di Camp, a private healthcare provider based in Campo Grande, Brazil, as the victim of an alleged cyberattack. According to the forum post, the attackers claim to have obtained internal data from the hospital. While the listing provides limited technical details, healthcare-related breaches commonly place sensitive patient and operational information at risk. If confirmed, the exposed data could include: * Patient records and personal information * Medical and diagnostic documents * Employee information * Internal administrative records * Operational and healthcare system data At the time of writing, these claims remain unverified, and Hospital Di Camp has not publicly confirmed the alleged incident. Analyst Note: Healthcare organizations continue to be among the most targeted sectors by cybercriminals due to the high value of medical records and the critical nature of healthcare services. Even unverified claims warrant close monitoring until independently confirmed or denied. #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #Brazil
posts.text_zh: 🇧🇷 巴西醫院據稱遭受資料外洩 威脅行為者已將位於巴西大坎普的一家私人醫療保健供應商 Hospital Di Camp 列為涉嫌網路攻擊的受害者。根據論壇帖子，攻擊者聲稱已從醫院獲取了內部數據。雖然該清單提供的技術細節有限，但與醫療保健相關的違規行為通常會使敏感的患者和操作資訊面臨風險。如果得到證實，暴露的數據可能包括： * 病患記錄和個人資訊 * 醫療和診斷文件 * 員工資訊 * 內部管理記錄 * 營運和醫療保健系統資料 截至撰寫本文時，這些說法尚未得到證實，Di Camp 醫院尚未公開證實所指控的事件。分析師註釋：由於醫療記錄的高價值和醫療保健服務的關鍵性質，醫療保健組織仍然是網路犯罪分子最有針對性的目標產業之一。即使未經證實的說法也需要密切監控，直到得到獨立證實或否認。 #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #巴西

posts.name: DailyDarkWeb
posts.text: 🇵🇭 Philippines' Mines and Geosciences Bureau (MGB) Allegedly Targeted in Data Leak A threat actor claiming affiliation with the "DeathNoteHackers" community has published an alleged data leak targeting the Philippines' Mines and Geosciences Bureau (MGB), an agency under the Department of Environment and Natural Resources (DENR). The forum post claims to include: * SQL database dump ("mgb-master.sql") * Archive containing additional MGB data ("mgb-central.tar.gz") * Internal files and records allegedly extracted from MGB systems The actor states the leak is intended as a protest against the DENR, though no technical details regarding the alleged intrusion have been disclosed. At the time of writing, the claims remain unverified, and neither the Mines and Geosciences Bureau nor the DENR has publicly confirmed the incident. Analyst Note: Government agencies remain frequent targets for hacktivist and politically motivated threat actors. Even when motives are ideological, the exposure of internal databases and administrative records can create significant operational and security risks if the claims prove legitimate. #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #Philippines
posts.text_zh: 🇵🇭 菲律賓礦業與地球科學局 (MGB) 涉嫌資料外洩 一名自稱與「DeathNoteHackers」社群有聯繫的威脅行為者發布了一份針對菲律賓環境與自然資源部 (DENR) 下屬機構菲律賓礦業與地球科學局 (MGB) 的涉嫌資料外洩事件。該論壇帖子聲稱包括： * SQL 資料庫轉儲（“mgb-master.sql”） * 包含其他 MGB 資料的存檔（“mgb-central.tar.gz”） * 據稱從 MGB 系統中提取的內部文件和記錄 該行為者表示，此次洩露的目的是為了抗議 DENR，但尚未披露有關所謂入侵的技術細節。截至本文撰寫時，這些說法尚未得到證實，礦業和地球科學局和環境和自然資源部都沒有公開證實這一事件。分析師註：政府機構仍然是駭客活動分子和出於政治動機的威脅行為者的常見目標。即使動機是意識形態的，如果聲明被證明是合法的，內部資料庫和管理記錄的暴露也可能造成重大的營運和安全風險。 #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #Philippines

posts.name: DailyDarkWeb
posts.text: 🇦🇷 Argentine Neurology & Sleep Institute Allegedly Suffers 636 GB Data Breach A threat actor has listed a dataset allegedly belonging to Instituto Ferrero de Neurología y Sueño (IFN), a specialized neurology and sleep disorder treatment center in Argentina. According to the listing, the stolen dataset is approximately 636 GB in size and was allegedly obtained in 2026. The post claims the data originates from the organization's internal systems, though no evidence has yet been independently verified. While the forum post does not fully disclose the contents, a compromise of a healthcare provider of this size could potentially expose: * Patient medical records * Personally identifiable information (PII) * Clinical documentation * Internal administrative data * Employee records * Medical imaging or diagnostic files At the time of writing, these claims remain unverified, and there is no public confirmation from IFN regarding the alleged incident. Analyst Note: Healthcare organizations remain one of the most attractive targets for cybercriminals due to the high value of medical records. Large-scale compromises can create long-term privacy risks for patients while disrupting critical healthcare operations. #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #Argentina
posts.text_zh: 🇦🇷 阿根廷神經學和睡眠研究所據稱遭遇 636 GB 資料外洩 威脅行為者列出了據稱屬於阿根廷專業神經學和睡眠障礙治療中心 Instituto Ferrero de Neurología y Sueño (IFN) 的資料集。根據清單，被盜資料集大小約為 636 GB，據稱是在 2026 年獲得的。該貼文聲稱這些數據來自該組織的內部系統，但尚未有證據得到獨立驗證。雖然論壇貼文沒有完全揭露內容，但這種規模的醫療保健提供者的妥協可能會暴露： * 病患醫療記錄 * 個人識別資訊 (PII) * 臨床文件 * 內部管理資料 * 員工記錄 * 醫學影像或診斷文件 截至撰寫本文時，這些說法尚未得到證實，並且 IFN 尚未對所指控的事件進行公開確認。分析師註：由於醫療記錄的價值很高，醫療機構仍然是網路犯罪分子最具吸引力的目標之一。大規模的洩漏可能會給患者帶來長期的隱私風險，同時擾亂關鍵的醫療保健運作。 #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #Argentina

posts.name: DailyDarkWeb
posts.text: 🇵🇪 Peruvian Educational Institute ISAM Allegedly Suffers Student Data Leak A threat actor has published what they claim is a database belonging to Instituto Peruano Sabio Nacional Antúnez de Mayolo (ISAM), a higher education institution in Peru. According to the forum post, the leaked dataset allegedly contains comprehensive personal and academic information belonging to students. The threat actor claims the exposed data includes: * National ID numbers * Full names * Email addresses * Phone numbers * Enrollment dates * Academic programs * Student records * Additional personally identifiable information (PII) If authentic, the exposure could significantly impact current and former students by increasing the risk of identity theft, financial fraud, and highly targeted phishing campaigns. At the time of writing, these claims remain unverified, and there is no independent confirmation that ISAM has experienced a cybersecurity incident or that the advertised dataset is genuine. Analyst Note: Educational institutions maintain long-lived identity records that are particularly valuable to cybercriminals. When combined with national ID numbers and academic information, these datasets can facilitate identity fraud, account takeover attempts, and sophisticated social engineering attacks against both students and institutional staff. #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #Peru
posts.text_zh: 🇵🇪 秘魯教育學院 ISAM 據稱遭受學生資料外洩 威脅行為者發布了他們聲稱屬於秘魯高等教育機構 Instituto Peruano Sabio Nacional Antúnez de Mayolo (ISAM) 的資料庫。根据论坛帖子，泄露的数据集据称包含属于学生的全面个人和学术信息。威脅行為者聲稱，暴露的資料包括： * 國民身分證號碼 * 全名 * 電子郵件地址 * 電話號碼 * 入學日期 * 學術課程 * 學生記錄 * 其他個人識別資訊 (PII) 如果屬實，該暴露可能會增加身分盜竊、財務詐欺和高度針對性的網路釣魚活動的風險，從而對當前和以前的學生產生重大影響。截至本文撰寫時，這些說法尚未得到證實，並且沒有獨立的證據表明 ISAM 經歷過網路安全事件或廣告資料集的真實性。分析师注释：教育机构维护长期的身份记录，这对网络犯罪分子特别有价值。當與國家身分證號碼和學術資訊結合時，這些資料集可以促進針對學生和機構工作人員的身份詐欺、帳戶接管嘗試以及複雜的社會工程攻擊。 #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #Peru

posts.name: DailyDarkWeb
posts.text: CISA confirms exploitation of critical SharePoint zero-day CISA added CVE-2026-58644, a critical SharePoint Server deserialization vulnerability, to its Known Exploited Vulnerabilities catalog. Microsoft confirmed that the flaw was exploited as a zero-day before patches became available on July 14. CISA also warned that attackers are chaining SharePoint vulnerabilities to execute code, steal IIS machine keys, establish persistence, and deploy malware. #DDW #CISA #Vulnerability #Microsoft
posts.text_zh: CISA 確認嚴重的 SharePoint 零日漏洞被利用 CISA 將 CVE-2026-58644（一個嚴重的 SharePoint Server 反序列化漏洞）新增至其已知的已利用漏洞目錄。微軟證實，該漏洞在 7 月 14 日補丁發布前就被當作零日漏洞。 CISA 還警告稱，攻擊者正在連結 SharePoint 漏洞來執行程式碼、竊取 IIS 機器金鑰、建立持久性並部署惡意軟體。 #DDW #CISA #漏洞 #Microsoft

posts.name: DailyDarkWeb
posts.text: 🇫🇷 French Insurance Database with 1.3 Million Records Allegedly Listed for Sale A threat actor is advertising what they claim is a database belonging to http://mutuelledesmotards.fr, a French motorcycle insurance provider. According to the forum post: * Approximately 1,338,105 user records are included * Around 160,000 unique email addresses are allegedly affected * The data was reportedly obtained in February 2025 * The dataset is distributed in JSON format The threat actor claims the exposed information includes: * Full names * Email addresses * Phone numbers * ZIP/postal codes * Insurance-related customer records and associated metadata If authentic, the exposure could enable targeted phishing campaigns, identity fraud, and social engineering attacks against policyholders. At the time of writing, these claims remain unverified, and there is no independent confirmation that Mutuelle des Motards has experienced a cybersecurity incident or that the advertised data is genuine. Analyst Note: Insurance providers maintain highly valuable personal information that can be combined with previously leaked datasets to enrich victim profiles. Even without financial data, customer contact details and insurance records are frequently leveraged in fraud schemes and credential-based attacks. #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #France
posts.text_zh: 🇫🇷 據稱出售 130 萬筆記錄的法國保險資料庫 威脅行為者正在宣傳他們聲稱屬於法國摩托車保險提供者 http://mutuelledesmotards.fr 的資料庫。根據論壇貼文： * 大約包含 1,338,105 筆使用者記錄 * 據稱約 160,000 個獨特的電子郵件地址受到影響 * 據報道，資料於 2025 年 2 月取得 * 資料集以 JSON 格式分發 威脅參與者聲稱揭露的資訊包括： * 全名 * 資料地址 * 資料集 相關電子郵件地址如果真實，該暴露可能會導致有針對性的網路釣魚活動、身分詐欺和社會工程攻擊保單持有人。截至本文撰寫時，這些說法尚未得到證實，也沒有獨立證實 Mutuelle des Motards 經歷過網路安全事件或廣告資料的真實性。分析師註釋：保險提供者維護非常有價值的個人信息，這些資訊可以與先前洩露的資料集相結合，以豐富受害者檔案。即使沒有財務數據，客戶聯絡方式和保險記錄也經常被用於詐欺計劃和基於憑證的攻擊。 #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #France

posts.name: DailyDarkWeb
posts.text: 🇰🇷 South Korean Robotics Company RGT Allegedly Suffers Source Code Breach A threat actor has published what they claim is the proprietary source code of http://RGT.kr (Robot Global Team), a South Korean robotics company specializing in autonomous service robots and logistics automation. According to the forum post: * The alleged breach occurred in July 2026 * The source code is being released publicly on an underground forum * The actor claims the code was stolen directly from the company * No customer database was advertised—only proprietary source code RGT develops autonomous service robots, including its SIRBOT product line, for commercial and industrial environments. If authentic, the exposure of proprietary source code could allow attackers to: * Analyze the software for undisclosed vulnerabilities * Reverse engineer proprietary technologies * Develop exploits targeting deployed robotic systems * Steal intellectual property and accelerate competing products At the time of writing, these claims remain unverified, and there is no independent confirmation that RGT has experienced a cybersecurity incident. Analyst Note: Source code leaks can have long-term consequences beyond data theft. Even when customer information is not exposed, attackers may uncover hardcoded credentials, API keys, cryptographic secrets, infrastructure details, or software vulnerabilities that could facilitate future attacks against both the vendor and its customers. #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #SouthKorea
posts.text_zh: 🇰🇷 韓國機器人公司 RGT 據稱遭受源代碼洩露威脅行為者發布了他們聲稱的 http://RGT.kr（機器人全球團隊）的專有源代碼，這是一家專門從事自主服務機器人和物流自動化的韓國機器人公司。根據論壇貼文： * 涉嫌違規行為發生在 2026 年 7 月 * 原始碼正在地下論壇上公開發布 * 攻擊者聲稱程式碼是直接從公司竊取的 * 沒有公佈客戶資料庫 - 只有專有原始碼 RGT 為商業和工業環境開發自主服務機器人，包括其 SIRBOT 產品線。如果屬實，專有原始程式碼的暴露可能使攻擊者能夠： * 分析軟體中未公開的漏洞 * 對專有技術進行逆向工程 * 開發針對已部署機器人系統的漏洞 * 竊取知識產權並加速競爭產品 在撰寫本文時，這些說法尚未得到證實，也沒有獨立的證據表明 RGT 經歷過網路安全事件。分析師註：原始碼外洩除了資料被盜之外還可能產生長期後果。即使客戶資訊沒有暴露，攻擊者也可能會發現硬編碼憑證、API 金鑰、加密秘密、基礎設施詳細資訊或軟體漏洞，這些漏洞可能會促進未來針對供應商及其客戶的攻擊。 #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #SouthKorea

posts.name: DailyDarkWeb
posts.text: 🇩🇪 German Jewelry Retailer Trauringe-EFES Allegedly Listed for Sale on Underground Forum A threat actor is advertising what they claim is a database belonging to http://Trauringe-EFES.de, a German online retailer specializing in wedding rings, engagement rings, and custom jewelry. According to the forum post: * Alleged breach date: May 16, 2026 * Database formats: CSV and SQL * The company is based in Nuremberg, Germany * Sample records were provided from multiple database tables The exposed samples appear to contain: * Customer names * Email addresses * Password hashes * Account status and confirmation details * Billing and shipping addresses * Phone numbers * Postal codes and cities * Order- and customer-related metadata At the time of writing, these claims remain unverified, and there is no independent confirmation that Trauringe-EFES has suffered a cybersecurity incident. Analyst Note: E-commerce databases frequently contain sufficient personal information to facilitate credential stuffing, phishing, account takeover, and identity fraud. If the claims prove accurate, affected users should change reused passwords immediately, while the organization should investigate the incident, rotate credentials where necessary, and review systems for unauthorized access. #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #Germany
posts.text_zh: 🇩🇪 德國珠寶零售商 Trauringe-EFES 據稱在地下論壇上出售 威脅行為者正在宣傳他們聲稱屬於 http://Trauringe-EFES.de 的數據庫，這是一家專門從事結婚戒指、訂婚戒指和定制珠寶的德國在線零售商。根據論壇貼文： * 涉嫌違規日期：2026 年 5 月 16 日 * 資料庫格式：CSV 和 SQL * 該公司位於德國紐倫堡 * 樣本記錄由多個資料庫表提供 暴露的樣本似乎包含： * 客戶姓名 * 電子郵件地址 * 密碼雜湊 * 帳戶狀態和確認詳細資料 * 帳單和送貨地址 * 電話號碼 * 電子郵件地址 * 密碼雜湊 * 帳號狀態和確認詳細資料 * 帳單和送貨地址 * 電話號碼 *截至撰寫本文時，這些聲明尚未得到驗證，也沒有獨立確認Trauringe-EFES 遭遇網路安全事件。分析師註釋：電子商務資料庫通常包含足夠的個人信息，以促進撞庫、網路釣魚、帳戶接管和身份詐欺。如果聲明準確，受影響的使用者應立即更改重複使用的密碼，而組織應調查事件，在必要時輪換憑證，並檢查系統是否存在未經授權的存取。 #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #Germany

posts.text: 🚨🇵🇭 Mines and Geosciences Bureau data allegedly leaked A forum actor claims to have leaked data belonging to the Philippines’ Mines and Geosciences Bureau, an agency operating under the Department of Environment and Natural Resources. The exposed material allegedly includes survey data, geolocation and logistics information, permits, names, signatures, addresses, contact details, PDF documents, images, and SQL database files. This claim is currently unverified. 💥 Get early visibility into underground claims, including unblurred screenshots, before they turn into headlines: http://darkwebinformer.com/pricing
posts.text_zh: 🚨🇵🇭 菲律賓礦業和地球科學局數據涉嫌洩露 一名論壇參與者聲稱洩露了菲律賓礦業和地球科學局的數據，該局是環境和自然資源部下屬的一個機構。該帖子宣傳了 2,900 多個文檔，壓縮後總計 21GB，解壓縮後約為 25GB。據稱，暴露的材料包括調查資料、地理位置和物流資訊、許可證、姓名、簽名、地址、聯絡資訊、PDF 文件、圖像和 SQL 資料庫文件。目前這一說法尚未得到證實。 💥 在地下索賠成為頭條新聞之前儘早了解它們，包括清晰的螢幕截圖：http://darkwebinformer.com/pricing

posts.text: Armenia detains alleged REvil suspect, but identity is disputed Armenian authorities detained a Russian tourist named Aleksandr Ermakov in response to a U.S. extradition request tied to a suspected REvil ransomware operator. His attorneys and family maintain that authorities arrested the wrong individual. #DDW #Armenia #Revil #Ransomware
posts.text_zh: 亞美尼亞拘留了涉嫌 REvil 的嫌疑人，但身份存在爭議 亞美尼亞當局拘留了一名名叫 Aleksandr Ermakov 的俄羅斯遊客，以回應美國對涉嫌 REvil 勒索軟體運營商的引渡請求。他的律師和家人堅稱當局逮捕了錯誤的人。 #DDW #亚美尼亚 #Revil #Ransomware

posts.name: DailyDarkWeb
posts.text: 🇧🇴 Bolivia Ministry of Education Database Allegedly Offered for Sale A threat actor claims to have breached Bolivia's Ministry of Education and is offering what they describe as a freshly extracted production database for sale on an underground forum. According to the post: * Approximately 6.94 million unique records are included * The dataset is claimed to have been extracted from a live production system * The actor alleges the database contains both active and historical student records covering educational institutions nationwide * The data is reportedly structured as a large JSON dataset The threat actor claims the database contains: * Student identifiers (RUDE) * National ID (CI) numbers * Full names * Date of birth * Gender * Educational records * Historical enrollment information * Additional student-related metadata If authentic, the dataset would represent one of the largest alleged education-sector data exposures in Bolivia, potentially affecting students across multiple educational institutions and training centers. At the time of writing, these claims remain unverified, and there is no independent confirmation that Bolivia's Ministry of Education has suffered a cybersecurity breach. Analyst Note: Education-sector databases are particularly sensitive because they often contain long-lived personal identifiers and records belonging to minors. Such information can be abused for identity theft, social engineering, fraud, and future credential-based attacks if the claims are confirmed. #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #Bolivia
posts.text_zh: 🇧🇴 據稱出售玻利維亞教育部資料庫 一名威脅行為者聲稱已侵入玻利維亞教育部，並在地下論壇上出售他們所描述的新提取的生產資料庫。根據該帖子： * 包含大約 694 萬筆唯一記錄 * 數據集據稱是從實時生產系統中提取的 * 攻擊者聲稱該數據庫包含覆蓋全國教育機構的活躍和歷史學生記錄 * 據報道，該數據被構建為一個大型 JSON 數據集 威脅攻擊者聲稱該數據庫包含： * 學生標識符 (RUDE) * 國民號碼 ID * 歷史記錄 *與學生相關的其他元資料 如果真實，該資料集將代表以下內容之一玻利維亞最大的教育部門資料外洩事件可能會影響多個教育機構和培訓中心的學生。截至撰写本文时，这些说法尚未得到证实，也没有独立证实玻利维亚教育部遭受了网络安全漏洞。分析师注释：教育部门的数据库特别敏感，因为它们通常包含属于未成年人的长期个人标识符和记录。如果声明得到证实，此类信息可能会被滥用于身份盗窃、社会工程、欺诈和未来基于凭据的攻击。 #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #Bolivia

posts.name: DailyDarkWeb
posts.text: 🇵🇱 Polish Publisher Wydawnictwo WAM Allegedly Suffers Data Breach A threat actor has published what they claim is the database of Wydawnictwo WAM, a Polish publishing house and online bookstore specializing in religious books, educational materials, and audiobooks. According to the forum post: * The breach allegedly occurred in July 2026 * Approximately 71,600 unique user records were exposed * The database is being offered for public download The threat actor claims the compromised data includes: * Customer names * Billing and shipping addresses * Order information * Customer account details * Commerce-related metadata * Additional database records associated with the online store At the time of writing, these claims remain unverified, and there is no independent confirmation that Wydawnictwo WAM has experienced a security incident. Analyst Note: Even if payment card data is not involved, customer databases containing names, addresses, purchase history, and account information can be leveraged for highly targeted phishing campaigns, credential stuffing attacks, and identity fraud. Organizations should investigate the claims promptly and rotate credentials or notify affected users if the breach is confirmed. #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #Poland
posts.text_zh: 🇵🇱 波蘭出版商 Wydawnictwo WAM 據稱遭受資料外洩 威脅行為者發布了他們聲稱的 Wydawnictwo WAM 的資料庫，Wydawnictwo WAM 是一家波蘭出版社和線上書店，專門銷售宗教書籍、教育材料和有聲書。根據論壇貼文： * 據稱該漏洞發生在 2026 年 7 月 * 大約 71,600 條獨特的用戶記錄被揭露 * 該資料庫可供公開下載 威脅行為者聲稱，受損的數據包括： * 客戶姓名 * 帳單和送貨地址 * 訂單資訊 * 客戶帳戶詳細資訊 * 商務相關的元資料 * 與線上商店相關的其他資料庫記錄 * 訂單資訊 * 客戶帳戶詳細資訊 * 商務相關的元資料經歷了安全事件。分析師註釋：即使不涉及支付卡數據，包含姓名、地址、購買歷史記錄和帳戶資訊的客戶資料庫也可用於高度針對性的網路釣魚活動、撞庫攻擊和身分詐欺。組織應立即調查索賠並輪換憑證或在確認違規後通知受影響的使用者。 #DDW #Intelligence #DarkWeb #Poland

posts.text: ‼️ Qilin ransomware claims 8 victims 🇺🇸 The Nueva School - A private pre-K through 12 school for gifted students in the San Francisco Bay Area. 🇺🇸 St. Martha Catholic Church - A Roman Catholic parish providing worship, religious education, and community services. 🇺🇸 Salina Supply Company - A Kansas-based wholesale distributor of plumbing, HVAC, waterworks, and pumping equipment. 🇺🇸 Heartland Catfish Company - A Mississippi-based producer and processor of U.S. farm-raised catfish products. 🇫🇷 Armara - A French seafood wholesaler supplying fish, shellfish, crustaceans, and other seafood products. 🇺🇸 KLD Labs - A manufacturer of machine-vision inspection and measurement systems for the railway industry. 🇮🇹 SICC - An Italian company specializing in building materials and construction products. 🇺🇸 AK Preparedness - A provider of emergency planning, safety training, and preparedness services.

posts.text: 🚨🇮🇳 PappyJoe patient data allegedly stolen for a $250,000 ransom A forum actor claims to have breached PappyJoe, an India-based healthcare technology company that provides cloud-based clinic and practice management software for appointments, electronic medical records, billing, prescriptions, patient communications, and administrative tasks. The listing advertises 413GB of data allegedly containing personally identifiable information tied to 6,873,180 patients and 531,673 files. The actor is demanding $250,000 and threatens to sell the material if payment is not made by August 5, 2026. The post does not provide a detailed breakdown of the allegedly compromised fields, but describes the material as patient PII and links to samples published. This claim is currently unverified. 💥 Get early visibility into underground claims, including unblurred screenshots, before they turn into headlines: http://darkwebinformer.com/pricing

posts.text: 🚨🇦🇷 Aceitera General Deheza dataset allegedly listed for sale A forum actor claims to be selling a dataset allegedly obtained from Aceitera General Deheza, an Argentine agribusiness company involved in agricultural production, processing, logistics, and exports. The listing advertises approximately 8 million records totaling around 124GB for $300. The seller says individual datasets can also be requested separately and published a proof-of-concept containing sample records from multiple tables. The allegedly exposed information includes names, addresses, phone numbers, email addresses, usernames, roles and permissions, authentication and device tokens, vendor records, business locations, machinery and IoT identifiers, SIM details, GPS coordinates, vehicle registration numbers, transaction histories, product and crop data, weights, humidity readings, timestamps, and synchronization metadata. This claim is currently unverified. 💥 Get early visibility into underground claims, including unblurred screenshots, before they turn into headlines: http://darkwebinformer.com/pricing

posts.name: DailyDarkWeb
posts.text: 🇧🇷 Brazil - Receita Federal (RFB) Data Breach Exposes 279 Million Brazilian CPFs Receita Federal, Brazil's federal tax authority, has allegedly been compromised, leading to the exposure of personal data for 279 million Brazilian citizens. An anonymous entity claims to have initially discovered a legacy system backup from 2019 containing 248 million CPFs. Following the government's denial of this initial claim, the entity states they subsequently extracted 279 million rows directly from the government's active system, alleging this newer data is current and not recycled. The group also criticized the Receita Federal for dismissing the initial claims as "fake news" and for not opening an investigation, despite inconsistencies noted in the data management. The Receita Federal has a history of denying data leaks, even when extensive CPF data has been exposed in the past, such as the 2021 incident involving 223 million Brazilians [8, 9]. The allegedly compromised data includes: * CPF numbers * Year of exercise * Year of death * Neighborhood * Postal code * Municipality of residence * Municipality of naturalization * Occupation nature * Occupation * Country of nationality * Country of foreign resident * Sex * Cadastral status (such as Regular, Suspended, Canceled, Pendente de Regularização, Nula, and Cancelada de Ofício) [11, 12] * Administrative unit * Address complement * CPF registration date * Birth date * Email addresses * Foreign status * Foreign resident status * Street name * Full name of the person * Mother's full name * Social name * Street number * Phone number * Residence street type * UF of residence * UF of naturalization * Last update date The listing highlights various inconsistencies within the database, such as 144,376 CPFs with invalid check digits and records for individuals purportedly born in the 12th century, indicating potential data management issues within the Receita Federal's systems. The volume of data for sale is 69.6 GB, with the 2026 database priced at $10,000 and the 2019 database at $1,300. Source: https://breached[.]su/threads/279-million-cpfs-receita-federal-2026-exposed.89277/
posts.text_zh: 🇧🇷巴西 - Receita Federal (RFB) 資料外洩導致 2.79 億巴西 CPF 據稱巴西聯邦稅務機關 Receita Federal 遭到洩露，導致 2.79 億巴西公民的個人資料外洩。一個匿名實體聲稱最初發現了 2019 年的遺留系統備份，其中包含 2.48 億個 CPF。在政府否認這一最初說法後，該實體表示，他們隨後直接從政府的活動系統中提取了 2.79 億行數據，並聲稱這些較新的數據是最新的且未回收。該組織還批評雷塞塔聯邦將最初的說法駁回為“假新聞”，並且儘管發現數據管理中存在不一致之處，但沒有展開調查。 Receita Federal 歷來否認資料洩露，即使過去曾曝光過大量公積金數據，例如 2021 年涉及 2.23 億巴西人的事件 [8, 9]。據稱外洩的資料包括： * 公積金號碼 * 行使年份 * 死亡年份 * 社區 * 郵遞區號 * 居住市鎮 * 入籍市鎮 * 職業性質 * 職業 * 國籍 * 外國居民所在國家 * 性別 * 地籍狀態（如正常、暫停、取消、Pendente de Regularção、Nula 和 Canadas（如正常） * 出生日期 * 電子郵件地址 * 外國身分 * 外國居民身分 * 街道名稱 * 人全名 * 母親全名 * 社會姓名 * 街道號碼 * 電話號碼 * 居住街道類型 * 居住 UF * 入籍 UF * 社會名稱 資料表突出顯示了資料庫中各種不同的街道類型 * 居住 UF * 入籍 UF *PF 的校驗聯邦系統內的問題。出售的數據量為 69.6 GB，2026 年資料庫售價為 10,000 美元，2019 年資料庫售價為 1,300 美元。來源：https://breached[.]su/threads/279-million-cpfs-receita-federal-2026-exposed.89277/

posts.name: DailyDarkWeb
posts.text: Fairlife ransomware attack halts U.S. dairy production Coca-Cola disclosed that a ransomware attack on its Fairlife subsidiary affected production-related systems and temporarily suspended production across the United States. The intrusion was detected Thursday, July 16. Fairlife’s Canadian operations and product safety were reportedly unaffected, while the full scope remains under investigation. No ransomware group has been publicly identified, and Coca-Cola has not confirmed data theft. #DDW #CocaCola #Ransomware #DarkWeb
posts.text_zh: Fairlife勒索軟體攻擊導緻美國乳製品生產暫停 可口可樂透露，對其子公司Fairlife的勒索軟體攻擊影響了生產相關係統，並導緻美國各地的生產暫時停止。這次入侵於 7 月 16 日星期四被發現。據報道，Fairlife 的加拿大業務和產品安全沒有受到影響，但整個範圍仍在調查中。目前尚未公開任何勒索軟體組織的身份，可口可樂也未證實資料被盜。 #DDW #可口可樂 #勒索軟體 #DarkWeb

posts.name: DailyDarkWeb
posts.text: Abbott confirms unauthorized access as ShinyHunters threatens a major medical-data leak Abbott Laboratories confirmed unauthorized access to a limited number of legacy Exact Sciences systems in its Cancer Diagnostics business after ShinyHunters listed the company on its extortion site. Abbott says operations, manufacturing, laboratories, products, and patient services were unaffected. ShinyHunters claims it compromised an employee through voice phishing, obtained Microsoft Entra SSO access, and stole data from several connected SaaS platforms. The group alleges the haul includes more than 30 million rows of personal information, over one million Social Security numbers, medical orders, and doctor-patient notes. Those volume and content claims have not been independently verified. No data had been publicly released at the time of reporting. #DDW #ShinyHunters #Abbott #Ransomware
posts.text_zh: ShinyHunters 威脅重大醫療數據洩露，雅培證實存在未經授權的訪問 在 ShinyHunters 將公司列入勒索網站後，雅培實驗室證實其癌症診斷業務中有限數量的傳統 Exact Sciences 系統受到未經授權的訪問。雅培表示，營運、製造、實驗室、產品和病患服務未受到影響。 ShinyHunters 聲稱，它透過語音網路釣魚攻擊了一名員工，獲得了 Microsoft Entra SSO 存取權限，並從多個連接的 SaaS 平台竊取了資料。該組織聲稱，這些資訊包括超過 3,000 萬行個人資訊、超過 100 萬條社會安全號碼、醫療訂單和醫病筆記。這些數量和內容的說法尚未得到獨立驗證。截至本報告發佈時，尚未公開發布任何數據。 #DDW #ShinyHunters #Abbott #Ransomware

posts.name: vxunderground
posts.text: R to @vxunderground: tldr you sending me malware is good, sometimes really interesting things happen. Thank you for sending me malware. Also, I really want to note I didn't do any investigative work or whatever, I just reverse engineered it, explained how it works, noted some IPs or crypto wallets, nothing else. I'm just the malware guy. I'm nothing else. There were a lot of people who came together after BlockBlasters appeared that did really cool stuff and helped a lot of people. Lots of people shared information publicly which identified people. I'm just bonking stuff with sticks and looking at cats
posts.text_zh: R 致@vxunderground：tldr，你向我發送惡意軟體很好，有時會發生非常有趣的事情。感謝您向我發送惡意軟體。另外，我真的想指出，我沒有做任何調查工作或其他什麼，我只是對其進行逆向工程，解釋它是如何工作的，記錄了一些 IP 或加密錢包，僅此而已。我只是惡意軟體的人。我什麼都不是。 BlockBlasters 出現後，有很多人聚集在一起，做了非常酷的事情並幫助了很多人。許多人公開分享識別人員身分的資訊。我只是用棍子敲打東西並看著貓

posts.name: vxunderground
posts.text: Maybe a year ago, I don't remember, a game appeared on Steam called BlockBlasters. BlockBlasters was actually malware, and it gained recognition primarily because it was used to crypto drain a terminally ill cancer patient. I was the first person (to the best of my knowledge) to reverse engineer BlockBlasters after people began notifying me about the game on Steam potentially being malware. It ended up being a huge deal, primarily because BlockBlasters was used for targeted crypto draining campaigns. Anyway, the FBI has begun arresting the people. The first person arrested was 21 year old Zyaire Dontaevious Zamarion Wilkins, based out of Florida. I assume more arrests are coming. This person specifically made $220,000 from the malware campaign, with $32,000 coming from a terminally ill (now deceased) cancer patient.
posts.text_zh: 也許一年前，我不記得了，Steam 上出現了一款名為 BlockBlasters 的遊戲。 BlockBlasters 實際上是惡意軟體，它獲得認可主要是因為它被用來加密末期癌症患者。在人們開始通知我 Steam 上的遊戲可能是惡意軟體後，我是第一個（據我所知）對 BlockBlasters 進行逆向工程的人。這最終成為了一件大事，主要是因為 BlockBlasters 被用於有針對性的加密貨幣耗盡活動。不管怎樣，聯邦調查局已經開始逮捕這些人了。第一名被捕者是佛羅裡達州 21 歲的 Zyaire Dontaevious Zamarion Wilkins。我猜還會有更多人被逮捕。此人從惡意軟體活動中具體賺取了 22 萬美元，其中 32,000 美元來自一位身患絕症（現已死亡）的癌症患者。

posts.text: 🚨🇦🇷 Instituto Ferrero de Neurología y Sueño data allegedly being ransomed for $150,000 A forum actor claims to have breached Instituto Ferrero de Neurología y Sueño, an Argentine medical center specializing in neurological and sleep disorders. The listing advertises 636GB of data containing approximately 474,826 files tied to 103,315 users. The actor is demanding $150,000 and threatens to sell the material if payment is not made by August 5, 2026. The allegedly compromised material may include patient, clinical, administrative, and other internal records, although the post does not provide a detailed breakdown of the exposed fields. Samples were shared through the actor’s Telegram channel. This claim is currently unverified. 💥 Get early visibility into underground claims, including unblurred screenshots, before they turn into headlines: http://darkwebinformer.com/pricing

posts.text: 🚨🇷🇴 Romanian government and commercial datasets allegedly bundled for sale A forum actor claims to be selling a bundle described as six Romanian datasets containing property, aviation, education, court, and courier records. The listing advertises 27,796,642 national property registration records, 437,809 court cases, more than 1.55 million courier delivery records, teacher salary data covering all 42 counties, and 94 files allegedly taken from the Bucharest Airports backend. The complete bundle is priced at $5,000. The allegedly exposed information includes names, CNP identifiers, home and delivery addresses, property details, teacher positions and salaries, court parties, IBANs, phone numbers, email addresses, hearing dates, flight information, administrator accounts, password hashes, contact submissions, subscriber details, and login logs. This claim is currently unverified. 💥 Get early visibility into underground claims, including unblurred screenshots, before they turn into headlines: http://darkwebinformer.com/pricing

posts.text: 🚨🇧🇷 Receita Federal dataset containing 279 million CPF records allegedly listed for sale A forum actor claims to have extracted a current dataset from systems tied to Brazil’s Receita Federal containing 279,008,638 records. The actor also claims to possess an older backup created in 2019 containing approximately 248 million CPF entries. The newly advertised dataset is described as a 69.6GB file, with two samples containing 10,000 records each published as proof. The actor is asking $10,000 for the alleged 2026 dataset and $1,300 for the 2019 backup, payable in Bitcoin or Monero. The allegedly exposed information includes CPF numbers, full names, dates of birth, email addresses, phone numbers, residential addresses, postal codes, municipalities, occupations, nationalities, parents’ names, sex, tax-registration dates, cadastral status, foreign residency indicators, and death-related records. This claim is currently unverified. 💥 Get early visibility into underground claims, including unblurred screenshots, before they turn into headlines: http://darkwebinformer.com/pricing
posts.text_zh: 🚨🇧🇷 Receita Federal 資料集，據稱包含 2.79 億筆 CPF 記錄，據稱已掛牌出售 一名論壇參與者聲稱已從與巴西 Receita Federal 相關的系統中提取了當前資料集，其中包含 279,008,638 條記錄。該演員還聲稱擁有 2019 年創建的舊備份，其中包含約 2.48 億條 CPF 條目。新公佈的資料集被描述為一個 69.6GB 的文件，其中兩個樣本包含 10,000 條記錄，每個樣本作為證據發布。該演員要求為所謂的 2026 年數據集索要 10,000 美元，為 2019 年備份索要 1,300 美元，可以用比特幣或門羅幣支付。據稱暴露的資訊包括公積金號碼、全名、出生日期、電子郵件地址、電話號碼、居住地址、郵遞區號、城市、職業、國籍、父母姓名、性別、稅務登記日期、地籍狀況、外國居住指標和死亡相關記錄。目前這一說法尚未得到證實。 💥 在地下索賠成為頭條新聞之前儘早了解它們，包括清晰的螢幕截圖：http://darkwebinformer.com/pricing

posts.text: ‼️🇺🇸 Abbott has released a statement regarding ShinyHunters claim on Abbott owned Exact Sciences Corporation: "Abbott is investigating a cyber incident in which there was unauthorized access to a limited number of internal systems in our Cancer Diagnostics business only.  This does not impact any business operations, product or product availability, manufacturing or lab operations, or our ability to serve patients. There is no impact to any other Abbott businesses, sites or systems. The legacy Exact Sciences systems are separate from Abbott’s. Upon learning this, we took immediate steps to address the situation. We have engaged leading third-party cybersecurity experts and law enforcement and are working diligently to further investigate the information accessed and resolve this issue. Based on what we know at this time, we do not expect any material impact on the business or financial results. We take our responsibility to protect our systems and data very seriously and will continue to closely monitor our systems." Source: https://www.abbott.com/en-us/corpnewsroom/diagnostics-testing/abbott-statement-on-cyber-incident-in-cancer-diagnostics-business
posts.text_zh: ️🇺🇸 Abbott 就 ShinyHunters 對 Abbott 旗下 Exact Sciences Corporation 的索賠發表了一份聲明：「Abbott 正在調查一起網絡事件，該事件僅在我們的癌症診斷業務中未經授權訪問了有限數量的內部系統。這不會影響任何業務運營、產品或產品、產品或實驗室運營能力或我們為我們的業務服務系統與得知這一情況後，我們立即採取了措施來解決這一問題，並正在努力進一步調查所獲取的資訊並解決此問題，我們預計不會對業務或財務業績產生任何重大影響，並將繼續密切監控我們的系統。

posts.name: DailyDarkWeb
posts.text: 🇲🇽 400,327 Government Supplier Records Allegedly Exposed in Mexico A threat actor claims that more than 400,000 supplier records belonging to DIF Tamaulipas (Sistema para el Desarrollo Integral de la Familia), a government family services agency in the Mexican state of Tamaulipas, were left publicly accessible without authentication. According to the post, the exposed database allegedly contains 400,327 supplier registrations, including: * Full names of individuals and companies * Mexican RFC (Tax ID) numbers * Physical addresses * Phone numbers * Email addresses * Legal representative names * Municipality and state information * Business categories and services provided The actor claims the data was openly accessible without authentication rather than obtained through a traditional network intrusion. At the time of writing, these claims have not been independently verified, and no official statement confirming the exposure has been identified. 💡 Analyst Note: Government supplier databases contain highly valuable information that can be weaponized for procurement fraud, business email compromise (BEC), spear phishing, and identity theft. Public-facing systems containing sensitive records should never rely on obscurity and must be routinely audited for authentication and access control weaknesses. #DDW #DarkWeb #Intelligence #Mexico
posts.text_zh: 🇲🇽 墨西哥據稱有 400,327 條政府供應商記錄被洩露 一名威脅行為者聲稱，屬於墨西哥塔毛利帕斯州政府家庭服務機構 DIF Tamaulipas (Sistema para el Desarrollo Integral de la Familia) 的超過 400,000 條供應商記錄在未經身份驗證的情況下被公開身份驗證的情況。根據該帖子，暴露的數據庫據稱包含 400,327 個供應商註冊信息，包括： * 個人和公司的全名 * 墨西哥 RFC（稅號）號碼 * 實際地址 * 電話號碼 * 電子郵件地址 * 法定代表人姓名 * 市和州信息 * 提供的業務類別和服務 該行為者聲稱這些數據是無需身份驗證的網絡訪問的，而不是通過傳統身份驗證的網絡。截至撰寫本文時，這些說法尚未得到獨立核實，也沒有確認該事件的官方聲明。 💡 分析師註釋：政府供應商資料庫包含非常有價值的信息，這些信息可用於採購欺詐、商業電子郵件洩露 (BEC)、魚叉式網絡釣魚和身份盜竊。包含敏感記錄的面向公眾的系統絕不應該依賴模糊性，並且必須定期審核身份驗證和存取控制弱點。 #DDW #DarkWeb #Intelligence #Mexico

posts.name: DailyDarkWeb
posts.text: 🇨🇦 Alleged http://MieuxEnseigner.ca User Database Offered for Sale on a Cybercrime Forum A threat actor is advertising what they claim is a database belonging to http://MieuxEnseigner.ca, a Canadian educational resource platform. According to the listing, the alleged dataset contains approximately 305,000 user accounts and includes: * Email addresses * MD5 password hashes * Password salts The seller also shared sample records appearing to show email addresses alongside hashed passwords and salts. At the time of writing, these claims have not been independently verified, and http://MieuxEnseigner.ca has not publicly acknowledged a security incident. 💡 Analyst Note: Even when passwords are salted, MD5 is an outdated hashing algorithm that is no longer considered secure against modern password-cracking techniques. Users should change their passwords immediately if they reused them on other services, and organizations should migrate to modern password hashing algorithms such as Argon2id, bcrypt, or scrypt. #DDW #DarkWeb #Intelligence #Canada
posts.text_zh: 🇨🇦 據稱在網路犯罪論壇上出售 http://MieuxEnseigner.ca 使用者資料庫 威脅行為者正在宣傳他們聲稱屬於加拿大教育資源平台 http://MieuxEnseigner.ca 的資料庫。根據清單，涉嫌的資料集包含約 305,000 個使用者帳戶，包括： * 電子郵件地址 * MD5 密碼雜湊 * 密碼鹽 賣家也分享了樣本記錄，顯示電子郵件地址以及雜湊密碼和鹽。截至本文撰寫時，這些說法尚未得到獨立驗證，http://MieuxEnseigner.ca 尚未公開承認發生安全事件。 💡 分析師註釋：即使密碼經過加鹽處理，MD5 也是一種過時的雜湊演算法，不再被認為可以安全地抵禦現代密碼破解技術。如果使用者在其他服務上重複使用密碼，則應立即變更密碼，組織應遷移到現代密碼雜湊演算法，例如 Argon2id、bcrypt 或 scrypt。 #DDW #DarkWeb #Intelligence #Canada

posts.name: DailyDarkWeb
posts.text: ⚠️ Alleged Ramp4u[.]io Database Offered for Sale on a Cybercrime Forum A threat actor is advertising what they claim is a full SQL database belonging to Ramp4u, a XenForo-powered online forum. According to the listing, the database allegedly contains: * 7,709 registered users * 7,784 forum posts * 1,732 discussion threads * 340,333 IP log entries * 3,875 private messages * Additional forum data dating back to 2024 The seller is asking $3,000 for the alleged database and claims it includes the complete XenForo SQL export. At the time of writing, these claims have not been independently verified, and Ramp4u has not publicly acknowledged a security incident. 💡 Analyst Note: Forum databases often contain significantly more than usernames and email addresses. Private messages, IP logs, and historical account activity can provide valuable intelligence for threat actors, enabling account takeover attempts, phishing campaigns, user deanonymization, and further attacks against community members. #DDW #DarkWeb #Intelligence #DataBreach
posts.text_zh: ⚠️ 涉嫌在網路犯罪論壇上出售 Ramp4u[.]io 資料庫 威脅行為者正在宣傳他們聲稱屬於 Ramp4u（一個 XenForo 支持的線上論壇）的完整 SQL 資料庫。根據清單，該資料庫據稱包含： * 7,709 個註冊用戶 * 7,784 個論壇帖子 * 1,732 個討論線程 * 340,333 個 IP 日誌條目 * 3,875 個私人訊息 * 可追溯到 2024 年的其他論壇資料 賣家為所謂的資料庫要價 3,000 美元，並聲稱它包含完整的 SQLen 資料。截至撰寫本文時，這些說法尚未得到獨立驗證，Ramp4u 尚未公開承認發生安全事件。 💡 分析師註釋：論壇資料庫通常包含的不僅僅是使用者名稱和電子郵件地址。私人訊息、IP 日誌和歷史帳戶活動可以為威脅行為者提供有價值的情報，從而實現帳戶接管嘗試、網路釣魚活動、用戶去匿名化以及針對社群成員的進一步攻擊。 #DDW #DarkWeb #Intelligence #DataBreach
